profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ Calgary AB — outside WWT STOLA territory. Major US ops: Ingleside Energy Center TX, Texas Eastern Transmission, Dominion gas utilities OH/UT/NC.

signals.signal_title: Microsoft AI partnership: M365 Copilot + ChatENB Azure OpenAI
signals.signal_description: Enbridge-Microsoft AI partnership confirmed: M365 Copilot rolled out to ~4,000 employees (~1/3 workforce), ChatENB Azure OpenAI chatbot deployed to all staff, Bing Enterprise company-wide. CIO Bhushan Ivaturi confirmed 80%+ workloads migrated to Azure. ms_standardized=true confirmed with source.

signals.signal_title: $14B Dominion gas utilities acquisition; IT integration active
signals.signal_description: Enbridge completed $14B acquisition of three Dominion Energy US gas utilities (Questar, East Ohio Gas, Public Service North Carolina), adding North America's largest gas utility operation by volume. Active IT integration of three separate utility platforms.

signals.signal_title: GenAI for retiring workforce knowledge capture
signals.signal_description: CIO Bhushan Ivaturi driving generative AI programs to capture institutional knowledge from retiring Baby Boomer employees. Top IT investment driver underpinned by completed cloud migration.

signals.signal_title: Cloud migration complete: 17 DCs to 4, 9,050 servers decommissioned
signals.signal_description: Enbridge completed cloud migration reducing data centers from 17 to 4 and decommissioning 9,050 servers. Carbon footprint reduced 66%. Foundation enables AI/data workloads across post-Dominion enterprise.

signals.signal_title: FY2024 Adjusted EBITDA $18.6B +13%; 19th consecutive guidance year
signals.signal_description: FY2024 Adjusted EBITDA $18.6B (+13%), DCF $12.0B (+6%). 19th consecutive year of financial guidance achievement. $7B capital deployment planned 2025. 30th consecutive annual dividend increase.

enrichment_notes: Largest energy infrastructure company in North America — liquids pipelines, gas transmission/distribution, renewable energy. Calgary HQ (channel mismatch, outside STOLA). FY2024 EBITDA $18.6B (+13%), 19th consecutive guidance year. ~12,000 employees. CONFIRMED Microsoft partnership: CIO Bhushan Ivaturi (SVP and CIO) led multi-year Microsoft collaboration — 80%+ workloads to Azure, M365 Copilot to ~4,000 employees, ChatENB Azure OpenAI chatbot to all staff, Bing Enterprise company-wide. ms_standardized=TRUE confirmed. ai_maturity=16 — M365 Copilot + Azure OpenAI deployed at scale, exceeds ≥15 threshold, AI bonus applies. Dominion $14B acquisition complete — active IT integration of 3 utility platforms. No MSP confirmed. WWT angle: Azure expansion beyond 80%, Copilot + security, OT cybersecurity for 17,000+ mile pipeline network, Dominion utility IT integration.
